zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Stuart於大約1670年出生在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可紐波利時，他的父親Duncan Stewart47歲，母親Anne Winchurst40歲。他於1700年1月30日與Dorcas Baston在美國緬因州約克威爾斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1745年登記服兵役。他在美國緬因州約克威爾斯被列為carpenter, millwright and in later years innkeeper。他去世於1752年3月11日在美國緬因州約克威爾斯享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Stuart于大约1670年出生在美国马萨诸塞州艾可紐波利时，他的父亲Duncan Stewart47岁，母亲Anne Winchurst40岁。他于1700年1月30日与Dorcas Baston在美国缅因州約克威爾斯结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1745年登记服兵役。他在美国缅因州約克威爾斯被列为carpenter, millwright and in later years innkeeper。他去世于1752年3月11日在美国缅因州約克威爾斯享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stuart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewart
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Stuart was born about 1670, in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, United States, his father, Duncan Stewart, was 47 and his mother, Anne Winchurst, was 40. He married Dorcas Baston on 30 January 1700, in Wells, York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1745. His occupation is listed as carpenter, millwright and in later years innkeeper in Wells, York, Maine, United States. He died on 11 March 1752, in Wells, York, Maine, United States, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Stuart est né environ 1670, à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, Duncan Stewart, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Anne Winchurst, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Dorcas Baston le 30 janvier 1700, à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1745. Sa profession de son indiquée est carpenter, millwright and in later years innkeeper à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis. Il est décédé le 11 mars 1752, à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 83 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Stuartが約1670年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスニューブリーで生まれた時，父Duncan Stewartは47歳，母Anne Winchurstは40歳であった。1700年1月30日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズでDorcas Bastonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1745年に兵役登録をした。アメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズでの職業はcarpenter, millwright and in later years innkeeperと記録されている。彼は1752年3月11日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズで83歳で死去した。

ko.Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치
ko.Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 로우리
ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Stuart(이)가 대략 1670년 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 뉴버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duncan Stewart(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Winchurst(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1700년 1월 30일 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 Dorcas Baston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1745년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그의 직업은 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 carpenter, millwright and in later years innkeeper이었다. 그는 1752년 3월 11일 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Stuart nasceu aproximadamente 1670, em Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Duncan Stewart, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Anne Winchurst, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorcas Baston em 30 de janeiro de 1700, em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1745. Sua profissão aparece como carpenter, millwright and in later years innkeeper em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 11 de março de 1752, em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Stuart родился около 1670 г. в местности нюбури, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Duncan Stewart было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Winchurst, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorcas Baston 30 января 1700 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1745 году он поступил на военную службу. Работал по профессии carpenter, millwright and in later years innkeeper в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 11 марта 1752 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Stuart nació aproximadamente 1670, en Newbury, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, Duncan Stewart, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Anne Winchurst, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Dorcas Baston el 30 de enero de 1700, en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1745. Su ocupación registrada era carpenter, millwright and in later years innkeeper en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos.
